instant.evidence: The blueprint is static config; the autonomous systems it prescribes target real-time dashboards, but the blueprint artifact itself has no latency surface.

natural.evidence: Prescribes an AI COO natural-language command interface and a visitor AI assistant with a 7-component system prompt.

permitted.evidence: Prescribes a Governance & Safety Engine: confidence scoring (>0.80 proceed), approval boundaries, escalation protocol, per-agent budget enforcement with hard auto-pause.

adaptive.evidence: Prescribes a meta-agent self-improvement loop (performance analysis, prompt optimization, experiments).

contextual.evidence: Prescribes a RAG knowledge system and cross-session memory.

transparent.evidence: Prescribes agent activity logging with trace IDs and rolling-avg duration, a 24-tab Intelligence OS dashboard, and an agent behavior monitor.

governance.evidence: Governance engine, escalation chain, approval boundaries, and budget enforcement are first-class features.

observability.evidence: Activity logging + trace IDs + Intelligence OS dashboard + behavior monitor.

availability.evidence: Self-healing agents, orchestrator error isolation, atomic task checkout, and Promise.allSettled resilient loading.

lexicon.evidence: Standardized department/agent/initiative/ticket vocabulary and a 6-model data schema.

solid.evidence: Idempotent findOrCreate seeding, generic runAgent() wrapper with error isolation, confidence thresholds, budget hard-pause.

layers.name: Agent-Aware Governance
layers.how: Governance & Safety Engine with approval boundaries and escalation.

layers.name: Observability & Feedback
layers.how: Activity logging, trace IDs, Intelligence OS dashboard, behavior monitor.

layers.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
layers.how: Orchestrator + cron-scheduled agent fleets across departments.

notes: This blueprint is TBI-aligned by construction (governance, observability, safety, self-healing baked in). COMPLIANCE NOTE: because it generates autonomous agent fleets, any project built on this blueprint must still produce a per-artifact TBI attestation for each agent it instantiates.
